patch.value: Add reusable package-first temp-project dogfood script

Codify the manual package-first E2E flow into a reusable sandbox script that initializes an isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH project, installs bundled packages, runs package doctor, upgrade dry-run, SDK import smoke, search/calendar/context checks, linked tests, validate, and health.

A reusable sandbox dogfood script exists; it never touches the repository's real .agents/pm data; it covers install all, package doctor, upgrade dry-run, SDK import smoke, and core workflow checks; docs or release gates reference it where appropriate.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: ran pm search 'package-first dogfood script temp project install doctor upgrade SDK' --limit 10. Existing matches were closed dogfood evidence items including pm-gy6w, but no reusable script task remains open, so this follow-up is created under pm-59gj.
